channel.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast
channel.description: In under 10 minutes, get the most important AI stories, distilled into sharp insights and real-world impact. No fluff. No jargon. Just what matters and what’s next.
channel.itunes:summary: In under 10 minutes, get the most important AI stories, distilled into sharp insights and real-world impact. No fluff. No jargon. Just what matters and what’s next.
channel.itunes:author: Helix

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Thursday, April 2, 2026
item.description: OpenAI hits an $852B valuation in a record mega-funding round. A federal judge rules against the Trump administration’s ban on Anthropic’s AI in government. Anthropic accidentally leaks Claude source code. Google’s TurboQuant compression algorithm challenges competitors. Alibaba pledges <item>00B in AI revenue. Agentic AI tools go viral amid privacy concerns. Plus our AI Security segment: Microsoft’s RSAC 2026 announcements, ISACA’s governance gap findings, and the emerging threat of agentic AI collusion.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI hits an $852B valuation in a record mega-funding round. A federal judge rules against the Trump administration’s ban on Anthropic’s AI in government. Anthropic accidentally leaks Claude source code. Google’s TurboQuant compression algorithm challenges competitors. Alibaba pledges <item>00B in AI revenue. Agentic AI tools go viral amid privacy concerns. Plus our AI Security segment: Microsoft’s RSAC 2026 announcements, ISACA’s governance gap findings, and the emerging threat of agentic AI collusion.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Thursday, April 2, 2026
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI hits an $852B valuation in a record mega-funding round. A federal judge rules against the Trump administration’s ban on Anthropic’s AI in government. Anthropic accidentally leaks Claude source code. Google’s TurboQuant compression algorithm challenges competitors. Alibaba pledges <item>00B in AI revenue. Agentic AI tools go viral amid privacy concerns. Plus our AI Security segment: Microsoft’s RSAC 2026 announcements, ISACA’s governance gap findings, and the emerging threat of agentic AI collusion.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Tuesday, March 31, 2026
item.description: On today’s episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, we cover the biggest AI launches of the week including GPT-5.4’s one-million-token context window, Gemini 3.1 Ultra’s two-million-token multimodal reasoning, and Xiaomi’s MiMo-V2-Pro crossing one trillion parameters. We also break down OpenAI shutting down Sora’s public API due to unsustainable costs, major AI-driven layoffs at Meta and Oracle, and a new congressional push to pause AI data center construction. In our healthcare segment, we spotlight the trust gap between executives and patients on clinical AI, a landmark BMJ stroke tool trial across 21,000 patients, and major investment moves from Verily and Google in health AI.
item.content:encoded: On today’s episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, we cover the biggest AI launches of the week including GPT-5.4’s one-million-token context window, Gemini 3.1 Ultra’s two-million-token multimodal reasoning, and Xiaomi’s MiMo-V2-Pro crossing one trillion parameters. We also break down OpenAI shutting down Sora’s public API due to unsustainable costs, major AI-driven layoffs at Meta and Oracle, and a new congressional push to pause AI data center construction. In our healthcare segment, we spotlight the trust gap between executives and patients on clinical AI, a landmark BMJ stroke tool trial across 21,000 patients, and major investment moves from Verily and Google in health AI.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Tuesday, March 31, 2026
item.itunes:summary: On today’s episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, we cover the biggest AI launches of the week including GPT-5.4’s one-million-token context window, Gemini 3.1 Ultra’s two-million-token multimodal reasoning, and Xiaomi’s MiMo-V2-Pro crossing one trillion parameters. We also break down OpenAI shutting down Sora’s public API due to unsustainable costs, major AI-driven layoffs at Meta and Oracle, and a new congressional push to pause AI data center construction. In our healthcare segment, we spotlight the trust gap between executives and patients on clinical AI, a landmark BMJ stroke tool trial across 21,000 patients, and major investment moves from Verily and Google in health AI.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Monday, March 30, 2026
item.description: OpenAI closes a historic $110 billion funding round at an $840 billion valuation backed by Amazon, SoftBank, and Nvidia, while shutting down Sora to focus on its next-gen Spud model and releasing GPT-5.3 Instant. Anthropic surges from 4% to 40% enterprise market share as ARM partners with Meta to launch a dedicated AGI CPU forecasting $15 billion in revenue. In today’s AI Security segment, major breaches and reports reveal alarming gaps in enterprise AI protection, including the McKinsey Lilli hack, Cisco’s finding that only 29% of organizations are security-ready for agentic AI, and IBM’s data showing a 44% rise in AI-accelerated cyberattacks.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI closes a historic $110 billion funding round at an $840 billion valuation backed by Amazon, SoftBank, and Nvidia, while shutting down Sora to focus on its next-gen Spud model and releasing GPT-5.3 Instant. Anthropic surges from 4% to 40% enterprise market share as ARM partners with Meta to launch a dedicated AGI CPU forecasting $15 billion in revenue. In today’s AI Security segment, major breaches and reports reveal alarming gaps in enterprise AI protection, including the McKinsey Lilli hack, Cisco’s finding that only 29% of organizations are security-ready for agentic AI, and IBM’s data showing a 44% rise in AI-accelerated cyberattacks.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Monday, March 30, 2026
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI closes a historic $110 billion funding round at an $840 billion valuation backed by Amazon, SoftBank, and Nvidia, while shutting down Sora to focus on its next-gen Spud model and releasing GPT-5.3 Instant. Anthropic surges from 4% to 40% enterprise market share as ARM partners with Meta to launch a dedicated AGI CPU forecasting $15 billion in revenue. In today’s AI Security segment, major breaches and reports reveal alarming gaps in enterprise AI protection, including the McKinsey Lilli hack, Cisco’s finding that only 29% of organizations are security-ready for agentic AI, and IBM’s data showing a 44% rise in AI-accelerated cyberattacks.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Sunday, March 29, 2026
item.description: In this Sunday episode of the Helix.AI Daily Podcast, we cover SoftBank’s monumental $40 billion investment in OpenAI, the leaked details of Anthropic’s Claude Mythos model and the company’s reported $60 billion IPO plans, and OpenAI’s new Shell Tool enabling deeper agentic AI capabilities. We also examine Intercom’s Fin Apex 1.0 outperforming GPT-5.4 on specialized benchmarks, Meta’s groundbreaking TRIBE v2 brain-prediction AI, and OpenAI’s pivot from Sora toward a robotics-focused model called Spud. The episode closes with a themed segment on AI for Learning, spotlighting new federal legislation, Stanford’s education research findings, and Coursera’s data on student and educator attitudes toward AI.
item.content:encoded: In this Sunday episode of the Helix.AI Daily Podcast, we cover SoftBank’s monumental $40 billion investment in OpenAI, the leaked details of Anthropic’s Claude Mythos model and the company’s reported $60 billion IPO plans, and OpenAI’s new Shell Tool enabling deeper agentic AI capabilities. We also examine Intercom’s Fin Apex 1.0 outperforming GPT-5.4 on specialized benchmarks, Meta’s groundbreaking TRIBE v2 brain-prediction AI, and OpenAI’s pivot from Sora toward a robotics-focused model called Spud. The episode closes with a themed segment on AI for Learning, spotlighting new federal legislation, Stanford’s education research findings, and Coursera’s data on student and educator attitudes toward AI.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Sunday, March 29, 2026
item.itunes:summary: In this Sunday episode of the Helix.AI Daily Podcast, we cover SoftBank’s monumental $40 billion investment in OpenAI, the leaked details of Anthropic’s Claude Mythos model and the company’s reported $60 billion IPO plans, and OpenAI’s new Shell Tool enabling deeper agentic AI capabilities. We also examine Intercom’s Fin Apex 1.0 outperforming GPT-5.4 on specialized benchmarks, Meta’s groundbreaking TRIBE v2 brain-prediction AI, and OpenAI’s pivot from Sora toward a robotics-focused model called Spud. The episode closes with a themed segment on AI for Learning, spotlighting new federal legislation, Stanford’s education research findings, and Coursera’s data on student and educator attitudes toward AI.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Saturday, March 28, 2026
item.description: In this Saturday edition of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers seven major AI developments including OpenAI's expert-level GPT-5.4 release, the shutdown of Sora in favor of a mystery model called Spud, Google's Gemini Deep Think hitting 90% on elite math benchmarks, and the geopolitical fallout from Anthropic being blacklisted by the Pentagon. The episode also features a special AI for Fun segment spotlighting AI-generated actress Tilly Norwood, virtual influencer Mia Zelu, and Canal Plus's major generative AI partnership with Google Cloud and OpenAI.
item.content:encoded: In this Saturday edition of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers seven major AI developments including OpenAI's expert-level GPT-5.4 release, the shutdown of Sora in favor of a mystery model called Spud, Google's Gemini Deep Think hitting 90% on elite math benchmarks, and the geopolitical fallout from Anthropic being blacklisted by the Pentagon. The episode also features a special AI for Fun segment spotlighting AI-generated actress Tilly Norwood, virtual influencer Mia Zelu, and Canal Plus's major generative AI partnership with Google Cloud and OpenAI.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Saturday, March 28, 2026
item.itunes:summary: In this Saturday edition of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers seven major AI developments including OpenAI's expert-level GPT-5.4 release, the shutdown of Sora in favor of a mystery model called Spud, Google's Gemini Deep Think hitting 90% on elite math benchmarks, and the geopolitical fallout from Anthropic being blacklisted by the Pentagon. The episode also features a special AI for Fun segment spotlighting AI-generated actress Tilly Norwood, virtual influencer Mia Zelu, and Canal Plus's major generative AI partnership with Google Cloud and OpenAI.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - March 24, 2026
item.description: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.
item.content:encoded: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - March 24, 2026
item.itunes:summary: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.

item.title: Chips in Orbit, Helium Crisis & AI Video Explodes | Helix.AI Daily — Wednesday, March 25, 2026
item.description: On this Wednesday, March 25, 2026 episode, Helix.AI covers seven major AI headlines including Nvidia’s trillion-dollar Blackwell projection and orbital data centers, a critical helium shortage threatening chip supply chains, Meta shutting down Horizon Worlds, and Yann LeCun’s billion-dollar AI reasoning startup. The Wednesday spotlight dives deep into AI for Images and Video, featuring Gamma Imagine, xAI’s Grok video generation, and Google Veo 3.1’s cinematic AI video capabilities. The episode also covers AI regulation momentum, Apple’s Siri overhaul, AMD’s new AI processors, and major infrastructure funding rounds.
item.content:encoded: On this Wednesday, March 25, 2026 episode, Helix.AI covers seven major AI headlines including Nvidia’s trillion-dollar Blackwell projection and orbital data centers, a critical helium shortage threatening chip supply chains, Meta shutting down Horizon Worlds, and Yann LeCun’s billion-dollar AI reasoning startup. The Wednesday spotlight dives deep into AI for Images and Video, featuring Gamma Imagine, xAI’s Grok video generation, and Google Veo 3.1’s cinematic AI video capabilities. The episode also covers AI regulation momentum, Apple’s Siri overhaul, AMD’s new AI processors, and major infrastructure funding rounds.
item.itunes:title: Chips in Orbit, Helium Crisis & AI Video Explodes | Helix.AI Daily — Wednesday, March 25, 2026
item.itunes:summary: On this Wednesday, March 25, 2026 episode, Helix.AI covers seven major AI headlines including Nvidia’s trillion-dollar Blackwell projection and orbital data centers, a critical helium shortage threatening chip supply chains, Meta shutting down Horizon Worlds, and Yann LeCun’s billion-dollar AI reasoning startup. The Wednesday spotlight dives deep into AI for Images and Video, featuring Gamma Imagine, xAI’s Grok video generation, and Google Veo 3.1’s cinematic AI video capabilities. The episode also covers AI regulation momentum, Apple’s Siri overhaul, AMD’s new AI processors, and major infrastructure funding rounds.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Thursday, March 26, 2026
item.description: On this Thursday, March 26, 2026 episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers OpenAI's dramatic shutdown of the Sora video app and end of its $1B Disney deal, Elon Musk's $20B Terafab chip factory launch, and the Sanders/AOC moratorium bill on AI data centers. The Thursday AI for Families segment examines Senator Blackburn's AI duty-of-care framework for children, the White House's parental controls push, and HeyOtto's new purpose-built AI platform for kids ages 6-18.
item.content:encoded: On this Thursday, March 26, 2026 episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers OpenAI's dramatic shutdown of the Sora video app and end of its $1B Disney deal, Elon Musk's $20B Terafab chip factory launch, and the Sanders/AOC moratorium bill on AI data centers. The Thursday AI for Families segment examines Senator Blackburn's AI duty-of-care framework for children, the White House's parental controls push, and HeyOtto's new purpose-built AI platform for kids ages 6-18.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Thursday, March 26, 2026
item.itunes:summary: On this Thursday, March 26, 2026 episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, host Helix.AI covers OpenAI's dramatic shutdown of the Sora video app and end of its $1B Disney deal, Elon Musk's $20B Terafab chip factory launch, and the Sanders/AOC moratorium bill on AI data centers. The Thursday AI for Families segment examines Senator Blackburn's AI duty-of-care framework for children, the White House's parental controls push, and HeyOtto's new purpose-built AI platform for kids ages 6-18.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Friday, March 27, 2026
item.description: In this Friday edition, Helix Pulse covers Morgan Stanley's forecast of an imminent AI breakthrough alongside a looming U.S. power shortfall, OpenAI's GPT-5.4 achieving human expert-level performance, surging AI investment including a $1B raise from Yann LeCun's new startup, and accelerating state-level AI regulation. The themed Friday segment dives deep into AI for students, exploring Stanford's research findings on purpose-built tutoring tools, Coursera's data on institutional unpreparedness, and the bipartisan NSF AI Education Act driving a 114% surge in U.S. AI degree programs.
item.content:encoded: In this Friday edition, Helix Pulse covers Morgan Stanley's forecast of an imminent AI breakthrough alongside a looming U.S. power shortfall, OpenAI's GPT-5.4 achieving human expert-level performance, surging AI investment including a $1B raise from Yann LeCun's new startup, and accelerating state-level AI regulation. The themed Friday segment dives deep into AI for students, exploring Stanford's research findings on purpose-built tutoring tools, Coursera's data on institutional unpreparedness, and the bipartisan NSF AI Education Act driving a 114% surge in U.S. AI degree programs.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Friday, March 27, 2026
item.itunes:summary: In this Friday edition, Helix Pulse covers Morgan Stanley's forecast of an imminent AI breakthrough alongside a looming U.S. power shortfall, OpenAI's GPT-5.4 achieving human expert-level performance, surging AI investment including a $1B raise from Yann LeCun's new startup, and accelerating state-level AI regulation. The themed Friday segment dives deep into AI for students, exploring Stanford's research findings on purpose-built tutoring tools, Coursera's data on institutional unpreparedness, and the bipartisan NSF AI Education Act driving a 114% surge in U.S. AI degree programs.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Wednesday, April 1, 2026
item.description: On this Wednesday April 1st episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, Lucy covers a packed news day including OpenAI’s major strategic pivot — discontinuing the Sora API to focus on robotics world simulation while freezing the Disney partnership. Anthropic’s revenue has doubled to $20 billion annualized and Claude topped the App Store, despite being blacklisted by the Pentagon. Plus: GPT-5.4 with a 1-million-token context window surpasses humans on benchmarks, Google Gemini 3.1 Ultra’s multimodal reasoning, xAI Grok 4.20, Meta’s new in-house chips, and the US AI Exports Program launch. Today’s AI Pulse segment explores AI for Images and Video — from Lenovo’s on-device SD3.5-Flash model to the 4K generation standard and the current state of AI video tools.
item.content:encoded: On this Wednesday April 1st episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, Lucy covers a packed news day including OpenAI’s major strategic pivot — discontinuing the Sora API to focus on robotics world simulation while freezing the Disney partnership. Anthropic’s revenue has doubled to $20 billion annualized and Claude topped the App Store, despite being blacklisted by the Pentagon. Plus: GPT-5.4 with a 1-million-token context window surpasses humans on benchmarks, Google Gemini 3.1 Ultra’s multimodal reasoning, xAI Grok 4.20, Meta’s new in-house chips, and the US AI Exports Program launch. Today’s AI Pulse segment explores AI for Images and Video — from Lenovo’s on-device SD3.5-Flash model to the 4K generation standard and the current state of AI video tools.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Wednesday, April 1, 2026
item.itunes:summary: On this Wednesday April 1st episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, Lucy covers a packed news day including OpenAI’s major strategic pivot — discontinuing the Sora API to focus on robotics world simulation while freezing the Disney partnership. Anthropic’s revenue has doubled to $20 billion annualized and Claude topped the App Store, despite being blacklisted by the Pentagon. Plus: GPT-5.4 with a 1-million-token context window surpasses humans on benchmarks, Google Gemini 3.1 Ultra’s multimodal reasoning, xAI Grok 4.20, Meta’s new in-house chips, and the US AI Exports Program launch. Today’s AI Pulse segment explores AI for Images and Video — from Lenovo’s on-device SD3.5-Flash model to the 4K generation standard and the current state of AI video tools.
